title: Artisan Pottery
description: This mod adds a variety of new features related to the archeology update. Pots can now be customized how ever you want, there are new animals roaming the deserts and badlands and new structures to uncover.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82c5a9944ac63b602c6b37f0eee9d67b693d3349_0.webp)

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/929ef3a782a5b048c14775fb64074217aab35746.png)

This mod adds a variety of new features related to the archeology update. Pots can now be customized how ever you want, there are new animals roaming the deserts and badlands and new structures to uncover.

![list of some mod contents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42e9050b28364d9ad73a85735789f793805d5692.png)

![various pots that can be produced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf057d30dd0786da6da23371e5c07d91c43dd1de.png)

- To create new pots craft firstly potting clay, then use it in the trimming and then turntable block to customize the pot.

- To transition a hawk to a brute hawk or a pigeon to a brute pigeon right click it with a pigeon ring, found in dovecote structures

- The resplendent torch can be crafted and then activated via right click

- all Structures feature custom loot as well as suspicious sand and bundles.

- vultures spawn in badlands and deserts and can be tamed with rotten flesh

- pigeons, hawks and brutes can be bred via crafted grains

- The Bagdad Battery can be charged with lightnings during thunderstorms and store energy to unleash


Do not change and upload the mod, dont distribute it elsewhere under your own namea
